TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-pear_Laniahu

S.FORM: goule.
maz di an hai.
sadu mas aiza lukis at.
S.TRANSL: I see there is a tree, and

S.FORM: aiza maz a dii aiza tunkaukau a.
idadaza sia lukis matatapul mas nasi at.
S.TRANSL: 他一直採樹上的梨子，然後
He is busy plucking pears from on the tree, and then

S.FORM: halhalun maz a nasi a.
mm at aupa.
sizaun saicia mapungadah.
S.TRANSL: He takes them and puts them in

S.FORM: mapungadah kal.
na ka mavisik sian tu kudamunu i.
S.TRANSL: 然後，他水果應該很多的。
Then he would have had many fruits.

S.FORM: supah daingaz maz a las an.
ai hai.
na muhna (ka)ta sadu tu.
at ai ai na makuasian tu.
ai sinpasadu mita.
S.TRANSL: what we are being made to watch.

S.FORM: mm ooh ais (ma)via.
aiza maz a as kadaiza bunun a.
S.TRANSL: There are some people over there.

S.FORM: uu maz a pididikus a nii.
S.TRANSL: They make them take, aah, no.

S.FORM: ai silulu mas sidi tu.
S.TRANSL: ‘they lead away a goat in passing’

S.FORM: at.
at.
nii tu haiapun tu sintukua sain tu imi hai.
S.TRANSL: 不知道這個是什麼意思。
I don’t know what is the meaning of this.

S.FORM: aiza.
aiza mais.
mais ai mais isk mais iliskinun ta hai.
aiza aiza i mita maz a aiza mita patasan tupa tu.
S.TRANSL: We have a saying that says:

S.FORM: ai katuka.
ai ai mitmang sida mas ai.
itu bunun tu sidamu s ai.
at aupa.
ai sia mas luma tu kudamunu.
at aupa.
sadu kata mas tacini tu minduduav tu uvaz tu tundaza mas tampu.
S.TRANSL: 我們看到一個年輕人騎單車。
We see a youth riding a bike.

S.FORM: mmm nii tu haiapun tu mapinkua tu sia.
S.TRANSL: I don’t know what he’s doing.

S.FORM: ais panutung.
na mapi na mapi na mapikuabin.
uh amushangsia saia.
ai ai (h)ai masivit tu madaingaz cia sadu at maz a madaingaz hai nii tu haiap nii tu sadu aubaka ka ai malmananu saia matatapul nasi cia.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人觀察，他看得到嗎，他不知道，看不到，努力採下那些梨子。
That old man, looks at it, does he see it? He doesn’t know, doesn’t see it because, uhm, he tries very hard to pick those pears.

S.FORM: at maz a uvaz a sadu.
ai ka ungadahan mas makuangkuang tu iniliskinan at.
tanhaiiu tu.
tas tu kalala.
nasi at ka mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 那些下朋友，起了壞的念頭，偷走一籃梨子。
Those children, with their bad intentions, steal a basket of the pears.

S.FORM: ai pahasian pahasia mais sadu kata tu ai mais tanhaiiu muliva hai.
S.TRANSL: 所以，我們看那個的話，嗯，如果他偷著犯錯
So if we see that, uhm, if he makes a mistake by stealing

S.FORM: at nai a hai papunahtungun maz a dii bananaz a hai.
S.TRANSL: 他們就碰到那個那邊的男生。
Then they met with that boy there.

S.FORM: ka muhalhal isai cia taninhaiiu nasi an.
S.TRANSL: 偷走的梨子就掉下來了。
Then the pears that were stolen all fell.

S.FORM: unghaitu uninang nii.
aiza tu tas tu lumah cina mas dusa maz a ai uvaz punahtungan sia daan.
S.TRANSL: 還好，有一家人，一個媽媽和兩個孩子在路上碰到男生。
But fortunately there is a family, a woman and two children, who meets the boy on the road.

S.FORM: haitu.
kaungaan suu.
at aupa masial tu uvaz ai ai suhaisun sai cia.
S.TRANSL: 然後，好孩子把帽子還給他。
Then the good child gives it back.

S.FORM: nadadu sai a tupa tu ai.
ai ai mahtu as masaiv tatau.
S.TRANSL: “Uhm, can you guys give three of those?”

S.FORM: mahtu saduan tu adii uvazan hai uka(n m)as ham.
S.TRANSL: 看得見那個孩子沒有談心。
It can be seen that that child is not very greedy.

S.FORM: aupaka tatau aupa nai a hai.
minindangaz siza mas tamung cia.
S.TRANSL: 因為他們三個人，如果我們看見的話，那個孩子可以幫他們要求拿帽子。
Because the three of them, if we were to look at it, that child could, help them take the hat, if they were asking for it.

S.FORM: masuhais pahasia ai mahtu sia an makisaiv.
S.TRANSL: 還[給他們]，所以，嗯，可以要求
give it back so, uh, he can demand

S.FORM: ai makis makisaiv.
makisaiv sia uvaz cia tutau mas ai nasi tan.
S.TRANSL: 因為他還給他們，所以要求那孩子三個梨子。
He gave it back, so he can demand from that child three pears.

S.FORM: ai ima hai ka ai.
ai tacini hai ka at tasa ka nii amin sai a haiap ai ai nadaduan amin dii ai.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道，也許他們其中一個人有做了。
He doesn’t know, maybe one of them did it.

S.FORM: nadadu amin dii matatapul nasi tu madaingaz tu bunun hai istaimangtaimang sai a tu hai.
S.TRANSL: 也許全部那裡，一直採下梨子的老人，這是怎麼一回事？？
Maybe all of them over there, the old man who was plucking pears , what stupid thing is this?!

S.FORM: (ma)viatu maupa tan.
at pahasia ai an dii ha ha ha haningu an hai.
S.TRANSL: 嗯，那部影- 影- 影- 影片
Uhm, that mo- mo- mo- movie clip

S.FORM: ispasadu cia tu.
S.TRANSL: 那個，你們給[人]看的影片。
Then that movie clip that you made [people] see.

S.FORM: maz a kitngaab hai viatu aiza aiza aiza maz a bunun ma‘iskus mas sidi cia mudadaan sai a si si si sintupa tu.
S.TRANSL: 最開始，為什麼有有有那個人，牽著羊，走在路上，所說的？
In the beginning, why is is is there that person, taking the goat, walking on the road, what’s been said?

S.FORM: aiza ai aiza itu.
ai ai mabubuklas bunun tan cia haling a sintupa tu.
S.TRANSL: 嗯，這是聰明的人說的話
Uhm, how do intelligent people say this?

S.FORM: ai ma ai katu ai.
at hai hai kaupa cia.
